heading: How It Works
subtitle: Four simple steps from beginner to confident speaker. Your path, your pace.

steps.title: Take Your Placement
steps.desc: A quick, adaptive assessment identifies your strengths and areas to grow. No pressure, no judgment — just a clear starting point.
steps.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/></svg>

steps.title: Daily Discoveries
steps.desc: Personalized lessons delivered each day — a mix of vocabulary, grammar, listening, and speaking. Just 15 minutes a day.
steps.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"/><line x1="3" y1="9" x2="21" y2="9"/><line x1="9" y1="21" x2="9" y2="9"/></svg>

steps.title: Practice Freely
steps.desc: Role-play real-world scenarios: ordering coffee, making small talk, job interviews. Our AI responds naturally, building your confidence.

steps.title: See Your Progress
steps.desc: Rich analytics track your growth — fluency scores, vocabulary expansion, pronunciation accuracy. Celebrate every milestone.
